inputs.price_source: Yahoo Finance GYRO close 2026-07-16 (last session on or before as_of; thin volume ~2,000 shares)
inputs.shares_source: GYRO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260513_rpt20260331_acc0001437749_26_016537.htm cover page, shares outstanding as of 2026-05-13
inputs.net_assets_trend_note: Net assets in liquidation per share fell from $13.91 (12/31/24) to $11.76 (12/31/25), about -15.4% in one year, as management extended the target liquidation completion date and re-estimated entitlement/litigation costs upward. Q1 2026 ticked up slightly to $11.79 on a favorable expense variance. [Fact]
inputs.real_estate_source: 10-Q Q1 2026 Consolidated Statement of Net Assets, flat vs 12/31/2025
inputs.liquidation_target_source: 10-K FY2025 MD&A: 'the process of seeking entitlements and selling assets is completed in 2028'; originally targeted end of 2026, twice extended

b2k_agreement.counterparty: B2K Smithtown LLC (affiliate of B2K Development LLC)
b2k_agreement.asset: ~49 acre parcel of vacant Flowerfield land, St. James, NY
b2k_agreement.conditions: subdivision and site plan approval from Town of Smithtown; ~90-day investigation period; closing within 8 months of site plan approval (or 60 days after B2K waives the contingency)
b2k_agreement.seller_credit_note: Company must credit buyer at closing for industrial park sewer treatment plant / onsite infrastructure costs, already reflected in the liquidation cost accrual, not additive to it
b2k_agreement.source: 10-K FY2025 Item 1 and Item 7; 10-Q Q1 2026 Note 4

inputs.normalization_note: GYRO reports on ASC 205-30 liquidation basis of accounting: real estate is already carried at management's estimated net realizable value (not historical cost), and a single liability nets all remaining forecast liquidation and operating costs against forecast receipts through the 2028 target date. 'Net assets in liquidation' per share ($11.79) is therefore management's own current best estimate of total nominal cash to be returned to shareholders, undiscounted for time value. The gap to the $5.80 quote is a market-structure / illiquidity discount on a 2.2M-share micro-cap, not a GAAP-vs-fair-value gap. [Inference]

bear.notes: Article 78 appeal or Smithtown site plan delay pushes completion to end of 2029; B2K deal closes near the $24.0M low end (~$2.16/sh less than the $28.74M assumed in the base NRV) plus one extra year of entitlement/legal/G&A burn at the FY2025 run rate (~$1.5M/yr). [Assumption]

base.notes: Management's own liquidation-basis estimate as of 2026-03-31 is realized on schedule by the stated 2028-12-31 target: B2K sale closes at the $28.74M gross value already assumed, both properties otherwise sell at or above the mandated 2014 appraised-value floor, and no material re-estimation of costs occurs. [Fact: filing estimate] + [Assumption: timing holds]

sotp_build.notes: Management's own liquidation-basis estimate as of 2026-03-31 is realized on schedule by the stated 2028-12-31 target: B2K sale closes at the $28.74M gross value already assumed, both properties otherwise sell at or above the mandated 2014 appraised-value floor, and no material re-estimation of costs occurs. [Fact: filing estimate] + [Assumption: timing holds]

bull.notes: Full entitlement success at both Flowerfield (8-lot subdivision survives the Article 78 appeal) and Cortlandt Manor (154,000 sq ft Medical Oriented Zoning District density), properties sell at a premium to current NRV once fully entitled, no further cost drag, and timeline holds at 2028. Roughly reverts toward the 12/31/2024 per-share level ($13.91) rather than the eroded 2025 estimate. [Assumption]

optionality_gate.notes: Floor is not a GAAP-vs-fair-value adjustment; it is management's own disclosed liquidation-basis NAV, audited each quarter. Bear case (extended timeline + low-end B2K price) still returns an estimated 13.5% per year, so the downside is bounded but not risk-free: thin daily volume (about 2,000 to 6,000 shares), an unresolved Article 78 appeal on the Flowerfield subdivision, and management's own statement that additional capital may be needed through 2028 are real risks not captured in the point estimate.

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Liquidation-basis accounting already carries real estate at estimated net realizable value, not historical cost; the disclosed $11.79/sh IS the fair-value floor, not a GAAP understatement to correct

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 49-acre B2K parcel priced on a $24.0M-$28.74M contingent range depending on subdivision/site plan approval; base case uses the high end already

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single reporting segment; ongoing rental income roughly offsets a portion of holding costs during the entitlement period

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: No recurring operating FCF path is modeled; all value flows through the liquidation-basis NAV

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Wholly-owned real estate only, no minority stakes

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Company intends to dissolve and distribute net proceeds after settling debts; Article 78 appeal is the main dated legal contingency affecting the Flowerfield half of the payoff

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy: Liquidation basis of accounting (ASC 205-30): all assets stated at estimated net realizable value; all liabilities include estimated settlement and liquidation costs. There is no separate historical-cost book value to bridge from.
gaap_vs_fair_value.note: Unlike a typical nav_overlay ticker, GYRO's balance sheet under liquidation-basis accounting already is the fair-value estimate; the overlay here is the market discount to that disclosed figure, not a GAAP correction

lines.label: Real estate held for sale at estimated net realizable value (includes B2K high-end assumption)
Accounts payable, accrued liabilities, tenant deposits
Estimated liquidation and operating costs net of estimated receipts through 2028 (entitlement, legal, retention bonus, selling costs)

nav_overlay.notes: Use the disclosed $11.79 liquidation-basis NAV as the floor, not a separately derived GAAP book value; the B2K high-end price and the 2028 timeline are both already embedded and are the main swing factors in bear/bull

catalyst_paths.event: Town of Smithtown grants final site plan approval on B2K's 49-acre parcel
catalyst_paths.timing: company expects Q3 2026 subdivision approval for Flowerfield
catalyst_paths.impact: Starts the 8-month (or 60-day post-waiver) clock to B2K closing at $24.0M-$28.74M

catalyst_paths.event: Article 78 appeal (Incorporated Village of Head of the Harbor v. Town of Smithtown, et al.) resolved
catalyst_paths.timing: briefing complete as of July 2025; decision pending
catalyst_paths.impact: Company states Flowerfield is not expected to be sold until this is resolved; adverse ruling could force redesign of the subdivision and delay/impair value
Unlocks sale of the medical office parcels under the existing Medical Oriented Zoning District density

catalyst_paths.event: 2021 Mortgage Loan (Rialto Capital, ~$4.95M original) initial maturity
catalyst_paths.impact: Company has a five-year extension option; failure to extend or refinance on similar terms would add near-term liquidity pressure

catalyst_paths.event: Star Equity Fund LP standstill (Star Agreement) expiration
catalyst_paths.timing: 2026-12-31, or 2027-12-31 if both named directors are renominated
catalyst_paths.impact: Activist (approx. 7% claimed stake) regains ability to nominate directors / push for a sale of the company; could accelerate a whole-company transaction

catalyst_paths.timing: targeted 2028-12-31, twice extended already (originally end of 2026)
catalyst_paths.impact: Final distributions paid after debts and claims are settled

Further Article 78 setback, added entitlement cost overruns, or a forced low-end B2K close would push per-share NAV toward the bear case (~$9.00) and could require additional dilutive capital raises given management's own statement that more capital may be needed through 2028

notes: Confirm whether the Article 78 appeal has been decided since the 10-Q filed 2026-05-13; not resolved as of the latest filing reviewed
Confirm current status of the B2K site plan submission with the Town of Smithtown (company expected Q3 2026 approval)

Mechanical stance_proposal from marvin_valuation.py may compute 'accumulate' given base return >20% and dhando partial; Marvin recommends human sign-off before moving past 'hold' given thin daily volume (about 2,000-6,000 shares) and unresolved litigation
Verify whether any interim/special distribution has been declared since 2026-03-31

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

falsifiers: Forced sale or failed entitlement marks real estate NRV below the low case.
Cash burn through 2028 consumes more than the low-case residual.
Refinancing or default increases the claim above the low case.
Further re-estimation (as in FY2025 NAV drop $13.91→$11.76) pushes costs beyond the low case.
Unmodeled claims exceed the low case.
Article 78 or Smithtown denial collapses the B2K path and forces a re-mark below current NRV.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete liquidation-component schedule. Management net assets in liquidation is the primary floor; B2K entitlement is an embedded milestone, not a second stack.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Liquidation-basis statement of net assets is decomposed once. B2K entitlement is embedded in real-estate NRV; Article 78 risk sits in the cost/NRV ranges and dated payoff scenarios.

component_groups.adjustments: Entitlement and sale timing sit in the range. Embedded option documented in component_valuation with treatment=embedded.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key real_estate_nrv; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes Smithtown site plan path supporting the \.74M gross already in NRV.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Target liquidation completion 2028-12-31; Article 78 can extend into 2029 in bear.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Seller credit \ and entitlement costs are inside the liquidation cost accrual.

component_groups.label: Cash and other assets
component_groups.adjustments: Burn through 2028 is partly in the cost accrual.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key cash_and_other_assets; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Loans payable
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key loans_payable; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Estimated liquidation and operating costs (net)
component_groups.valuation_basis: Management's estimated liquidation and operating cost accrual.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key estimated_liquidation_costs; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Other liabilities
component_groups.adjustments: Plug to reconcile to $11.79 net assets.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key other_liabilities; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Klarman: when accounting already marks to NRV, the work is verifying the mark and the path, not inventing a second NAV.
Greenblatt: market-structure discount on a 2.2M-share micro-cap can be the mispricing if the liquidation path holds.
limitations: Thin trading and possible additional capital needs through 2028 are real risks outside the point NAV.
FY2025 already showed a large NAV re-estimation; further marks are possible.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

additive_components.label: Real estate held for sale at estimated NRV

source.locator: 2,199,308 shares outstanding as of 2026-05-13 cover page

assumptions.label: Real estate held for sale at estimated NRV
assumptions.rationale: Base is filing liquidation-basis NRV including the B2K $28.74M gross assumption; low/high bound entitlement or forced-sale re-marks.

calculations.label: Real estate held for sale at estimated NRV per share

additive_components.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026 liquidation-basis statement of net assets; proof base 24.5486/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (GYRO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260513_rpt20260331_acc0001437749_26_016537.htm).
additive_components.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: ASC 205-30 estimated net realizable value, not historical cost.
additive_components.falsifier: Forced sale or failed entitlement marks real estate NRV below the low case.

additive_components.label: Cash and other assets

source.locator: 2,199,308 shares outstanding as of 2026-05-13 cover page

assumptions.label: Cash and other non-real-estate assets
assumptions.rationale: Base equals total assets $58.107M less real estate held for sale $53.990M; range allows working-capital burn before distributions.

calculations.label: Cash and other non-real-estate assets per share

additive_components.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026 liquidation-basis statement of net assets; proof base 1.872/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (GYRO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260513_rpt20260331_acc0001437749_26_016537.htm).
additive_components.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Working capital available inside the liquidation plan.
additive_components.falsifier: Cash burn through 2028 consumes more than the low-case residual.

additive_components.label: Loans payable

source.locator: 2,199,308 shares outstanding as of 2026-05-13 cover page

assumptions.label: Loans payable
assumptions.rationale: Contractual loans payable senior to equity; low case assumes refinancing stress or higher drawn balances.

additive_components.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026 liquidation-basis statement of net assets; proof base -4.9062/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (GYRO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260513_rpt20260331_acc0001437749_26_016537.htm).
additive_components.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Contractual debt senior to equity distributions.
additive_components.falsifier: Refinancing or default increases the claim above the low case.

additive_components.label: Estimated liquidation and operating costs (net)

source.locator: 2,199,308 shares outstanding as of 2026-05-13 cover page

assumptions.label: Estimated liquidation and operating costs net of receipts
assumptions.rationale: Management accrual through the 2028 target date, including B2K seller credit; FY2025 already showed upward re-estimation risk.

calculations.label: Estimated liquidation and operating costs net of receipts per share
Estimated liquidation and operating costs net of receipts per share (senior claim)

additive_components.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026 liquidation-basis statement of net assets; proof base -7.5978/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (GYRO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260513_rpt20260331_acc0001437749_26_016537.htm).
additive_components.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Management's disclosed accrual through the 2028 target date.
additive_components.falsifier: Further re-estimation (as in FY2025 NAV drop $13.91→$11.76) pushes costs beyond the low case.

additive_components.label: Other liabilities

source.locator: 2,199,308 shares outstanding as of 2026-05-13 cover page

assumptions.label: Other balance-sheet liabilities
assumptions.rationale: Plug of accounts payable, accrued liabilities, and tenant deposits after loans and estimated liquidation costs; reconciles to $11.79 net assets in liquidation.

calculations.label: Other balance-sheet liabilities per share (senior claim)

additive_components.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026 liquidation-basis statement of net assets; proof base -2.1293/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (GYRO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260513_rpt20260331_acc0001437749_26_016537.htm).
additive_components.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Remaining balance-sheet liabilities senior to equity.
additive_components.falsifier: Unmodeled claims exceed the low case.

embedded_components.label: B2K Flowerfield entitlement option (embedded in NRV)
embedded_components.evidence: B2K agreement $24.0–$28.74M on ~49 acres; base NRV already uses $28.74M. Embedded so not added twice; high case is premium to current NRV if entitlements exceed the plan.
embedded_components.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
embedded_components.assumption_summary: Embedded in real_estate_nrv base; additive high only for upside above current NRV.
embedded_components.falsifier: Article 78 or Smithtown denial collapses the B2K path and forces a re-mark below current NRV.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One Gyrodyne, LLC common share claim on net assets in liquidation after debt, estimated liquidation costs, and entitlement contingencies.
economic_claim.unit_source: 10-Q Q1 2026 cover page, shares outstanding as of 2026-05-13
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Assets at estimated NRV less loans, other liabilities, and estimated liquidation/operating costs equals disclosed net assets in liquidation. B2K option is embedded in real-estate NRV.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: ASC 205-30 liquidation-basis 10-Q Q1 2026 statement of net assets in liquidation ($11.79/sh).

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Real estate held for sale at estimated NRV
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

top_dissents.label: Mohnish Pabrai
top_dissents.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

pricing.note: Water and surface royalty pricing vs WTI / activity.

world_model_context.disclaimer: Context only. World Model fails and Superorg gaps flag [HUMAN REVIEW]; they do not auto-rewrite Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires _system/reviews/pending/world_model_promote_{TICKER}_{date}.md.
